Package jline.lang.nodes

Class Place

  • java.lang.Object
    • jline.lang.Element
      • jline.lang.NetworkElement
        • jline.lang.nodes.Node
          • jline.lang.nodes.StatefulNode
            • jline.lang.nodes.Station
              • jline.lang.nodes.Place
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable
    public class Place
extends Station
    Place as in a stochastic Petri net model
